summary: Comprehensive testing of KOLOR STUDIO CRM - All 11 requested features verified successfully. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (16/16 tests). Frontend UI fully functional including login, dashboard views, portfolio management, and public portfolio page.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Login with test credentials returns 200 with token and user data
GET /api/auth/me - Returns authenticated user profile
GET /api/leads - Returns list of 18 leads
GET /api/leads/stats - Returns stats: 18 total, NEW:7, QUOTED:4, BOOKED:5, CONTACTED:2
GET /api/portfolio - Returns user's portfolio items (1 item: 'Airplane Mode')
GET /api/portfolio/public/:userId - Public portfolio shows 'Kolor Studio' by Emmanuel Obokoh
GET /api/settings - Returns user settings with NGN currency
GET /api/analytics/dashboard - Returns analytics with 44.4% conversion rate
GET /api/bookings - Returns bookings list
GET /api/bookings/calendar - Returns 7 calendar events
Dashboard loads after login with 4 stats cards (Total Leads: 18, New Leads: 7, Quoted: 4, Booked: 5)
Kanban board view shows leads organized by status columns (New, Contacted, Quoted, Negotiating, Booked)
Portfolio tab (5th toolbar icon) opens Portfolio management with 'My Portfolio' header
Portfolio management shows sharing URL, Preview button, Add Work button
Portfolio shows existing item 'Airplane Mode' with category 'Other'
Calendar view shows March 2026 with bookings visible
Analytics view shows Revenue Analytics with Pipeline Value, Conversion Rate (44.4%), charts
Settings modal opens with Currency and Portfolio tabs
Public portfolio page at /portfolio/:userId shows 'Kolor Studio' header with 'by Emmanuel Obokoh'
Public portfolio has All/Other category filters and Featured toggle
Portfolio lightbox opens when clicking item, shows full image with title 'Airplane Mode'
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints properly secured with JWT authentication where required
Public portfolio endpoint correctly allows unauthenticated access
Portfolio feature fully implemented with CRUD operations, image upload to Supabase Storage
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Good separation between authenticated portfolio management and public portfolio view
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test account with 18 leads and 1 portfolio item
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 features verified working: 1) Login POST /api/auth/login, 2) Dashboard with stats cards, 3) Portfolio tab (5th icon), 4) Portfolio management with My Portfolio header/sharing URL/Preview/Add Work, 5) Portfolio item 'Airplane Mode' visible, 6) Public portfolio at /portfolio/3aa2d156-aa26-48ef-8daf-e95641b68b3e, 7) Public portfolio filters (All, Other, Featured), 8) Kanban board, 9) Calendar view, 10) Analytics view, 11) Settings modal. Backend: Express/TypeScript on port 8001, Frontend: Vite React/TypeScript on port 3000. Project root: /app/kolor-studio-v2/

login_flow.response: 200 OK with token and user object

portfolio_management.header: My Portfolio with 'Showcase your best work' description
portfolio_management.sharing_url: Displays truncated URL with copy button
portfolio_management.preview_button: Opens public portfolio in new tab

public_portfolio.lightbox: Clicking item opens full-screen lightbox with navigation
public_portfolio.footer: Powered by KOLOR STUDIO with 'Get in Touch' button

features_verified.kanban_board: Shows columns: New (7), Contacted (2), Quoted (4), Negotiating (0)
features_verified.calendar_view: March 2026 with Month/Week/Day/Agenda views, shows 7 upcoming bookings
features_verified.analytics_view: Revenue Analytics with Pipeline Value, Booked This Month, Year to Date, Conversion Rate (44.4%)
features_verified.settings_modal: Currency tab with NGN selected, Symbol Position, Number Format, Tax Rate
